WITH y12 AS (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           SUM(y.Consumption) AS cons12
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
      AND substr(y.Date,1,4) = '2012'
    GROUP BY c.Segment
),
y13 AS (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           SUM(y.Consumption) AS cons13
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
      AND substr(y.Date,1,4) = '2013'
    GROUP BY c.Segment
),
pct AS (
    SELECT COALESCE(y12.Segment, y13.Segment) AS Segment,
           ( (COALESCE(y13.cons13,0) - COALESCE(y12.cons12,0)) / NULLIF(y12.cons12,0) ) * 100.0 AS pct_increase
    FROM y12
    LEFT JOIN y13 ON y12.Segment = y13.Segment
    UNION ALL
    SELECT COALESCE(y12.Segment, y13.Segment),
           ( (COALESCE(y13.cons13,0) - COALESCE(y12.cons12,0)) / NULLIF(y12.cons12,0) ) * 100.0
    FROM y13
    LEFT JOIN y12 ON y13.Segment = y12.Segment
    WHERE y12.Segment IS NULL
)
SELECT Segment, pct_increase
FROM pct
WHERE pct_increase = (SELECT MAX(pct_increase) FROM pct)
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment, pct_increase
FROM pct
WHERE pct_increase = (SELECT MIN(pct_increase) FROM pct);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

  SELECT driverId FROM drivers WHERE forename = 'Paul' AND surname = 'di Resta'
),
next_race AS (
  SELECT MIN(raceId) AS raceId
  FROM results
  WHERE driverId = (SELECT driverId FROM dr) AND raceId > 853
),
speeds AS (
  SELECT
    CAST((SELECT fastestLapSpeed FROM results WHERE driverId = (SELECT driverId FROM dr) AND raceId = 853) AS REAL) AS speed853,
    CAST((SELECT fastestLapSpeed FROM results WHERE driverId = (SELECT driverId FROM dr) AND raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM next_race)) AS REAL) AS speedNext
)
SELECT (speed853 - speedNext) / speedNext * 100.0 AS percent_faster
FROM speeds;	----- bird -----	formula_1

        LEFT JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
        WHERE c.gender = 'Female'
        GROUP BY c.client_id
    )
) lo ON fc.avg_loan = lo.lowest_avg
JOIN disp d ON fc.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id;	----- bird -----	financial

FROM loan l

  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM trans t
      WHERE t.account_id = l.account_id
        AND t.date > l.date

SELECT DISTINCT c.client_id,
       CAST((julianday('now') - julianday(c.birth_date))/365.25 AS INTEGER) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON d.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN card cr ON cr.disp_id = d.disp_id
JOIN account a ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN loan l ON l.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE cr.type = 'High';	----- bird -----	financial

       d.A2 AS district_name,
       d.A3 AS district_region
FROM account a
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE strftime('%Y', a.date) = '1993'
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM trans t
      WHERE t.account_id = a.account_id
        AND t.date < a.date
  );	----- bird -----	financial
